title: bellis rotundifolia proles pumila
intro: Bellis rotundifolia proles pumila, also known as Dwarf Daisy or Alpine Daisy, is a low-growing perennial plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Bellis rotundifolia proles pumila include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and promoting wound healing. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and skin problems.
